_comment: Recommended MCP server set for solo Claude harness. Copy to .claude/mcp.json and uncomment servers you use. See .claude/playbooks/mcp.md for selection rubric.

_filesystem_example._note: Sandboxed fs access. Rename key to 'filesystem' to enable.

_claude_in_chrome_example._note: Browser automation. Preferred over computer-use for web tasks. Install the Chrome extension first.

_computer_use_example._note: Native desktop automation. Requires accessibility grant per app. Only when browser/terminal insufficient.

_scheduled_tasks_example._note: Long-running / recurring tasks. Pairs with Automation-Intent.md.
